brief: Today's news highlights deadly wildfires in Spain, a US private equity bid for easyJet, and the death of Ann Widdecombe. Research papers explore missing data visualization, AI in crime linkage, and brain-computer interface trials in China.
news_summary: At least 11 dead in Spanish wildfire, Telstra outage controversy, Ebola death toll reaches 600, Apollo bids £5.7bn for easyJet, and Ann Widdecombe dies at 78.
papers_summary: Papers cover ImputeViz for missing data, AI for crime linkage, performance incentives in visualization, BCI trials in China, and compositional analysis of traditional Chinese paintings.

en.brief: Today's news highlights deadly wildfires in Spain, a US private equity bid for easyJet, and the death of Ann Widdecombe. Research papers explore missing data visualization, AI in crime linkage, and brain-computer interface trials in China.
en.news_summary: At least 11 dead in Spanish wildfire, Telstra outage controversy, Ebola death toll reaches 600, Apollo bids £5.7bn for easyJet, and Ann Widdecombe dies at 78.
en.papers_summary: Papers cover ImputeViz for missing data, AI for crime linkage, performance incentives in visualization, BCI trials in China, and compositional analysis of traditional Chinese paintings.

zh.brief: 颱風巴威來襲，台灣嚴陣以待；福建鞋廠大火致28死；美伊衝突加劇；廣西水庫潰堤引發安全擔憂。今日無優先論文。
zh.news_summary: 颱風巴威以近30年最大暴風半徑逼近台灣，多縣市停班停課；福建泉州晉江鞋廠大火28人遇難，習近平批示嚴肅追責；美伊互相發動攻擊，威脅停火協議；廣西老舊水庫因暴雨潰堤，洪災預警失靈引發討論。

todays_image.caption: Just as a fire hose section connects to fight fires, home swapping connects strangers to fight expensive holidays.
todays_image.title: Fire Hose Section
